task_text: Send email to the account Benelux compliance-heavy bank account Blue Harbor with subject "Security review follow-up" and body "Checking in on the open security review. Happy to answer questions and align on next steps."

Resolve Blue Harbor account and recipient contact

next_step.current_state: Outbox email file already written and cannot be overwritten; verification checks pass (canonical recipient used, no attachments required, content matches user request). Must now bump seq per outbox invariant.
next_step.observation: The outbound email file outbox/84510.json was created successfully.

next_step.current_state: All required actions done: wrote email and incremented sequence.
next_step.observation: outbox/seq.json was updated to 84511 after creating outbox/84510.json.

function.message: Done — I prepared the outbound email to Blue Harbor Bank’s account contact with subject "Security review follow-up" and the exact body you requested.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed AGENTS.md and outbox README: used canonical contact email, created one new numbered outbox file from seq pre-bump id, set sent=false, then bumped seq.json.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence shows Blue Harbor Bank is acct_004 and primary contact is cont_004 with email linde.van.der.werf@blue-harbor-bank.example.com; outbox instructions required using seq id 84510 for filename and incrementing seq to 84511 afterward.
